segments.text: Then He said to the disciples,
It is impossible that no offenses should come, but woe to him through whom they do come!
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: It would be better for him if a millstone were hung around his neck, and he were thrown into the sea, than that he should offend one of these little ones.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Take heed to yourselves. If your brother sins against you, rebuke him; and if he repents, forgive him.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: And if he sins against you seven times in a day, and seven times in a day returns to you, saying, 'I repent,' you shall forgive him.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: And the apostles said to the Lord,
Increase our faith.
segments.speaker: The Apostles

segments.text: So the Lord said,
If you have faith as a mustard seed, you can say to this mulberry tree, 'Be pulled up by the roots and be planted in the sea,' and it would obey you.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: And which of you, having a servant plowing or tending sheep, will say to him when he has come in from the field, 'Come at once and sit down to eat'?
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: But will he not rather say to him, 'Prepare something for my supper, and gird yourself and serve me till I have eaten and drunk, and afterward you will eat and drink'?
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Does he thank that servant because he did the things that were commanded him? I think not.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: So likewise you, when you have done all those things which you are commanded, say, 'We are unprofitable servants. We have done what was our duty to do.'
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Now it happened as He went to Jerusalem that He passed through the midst of Samaria and Galilee.
Then as He entered a certain village, there met Him ten men who were lepers, who stood afar off.
And they lifted up their voices and said,
Jesus, Master, have mercy on us!
segments.speaker: The Lepers

segments.text: So when He saw them, He said to them,
Go, show yourselves to the priests.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: And so it was that as they went, they were cleansed.
And one of them, when he saw that he was healed, returned, and with a loud voice glorified God,
and fell down on his face at His feet, giving Him thanks. And he was a Samaritan.
So Jesus answered and said,
Were there not ten cleansed? But where are the nine?
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Were there not any found who returned to give glory to God except this foreigner?
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: And He said to him,
Arise, go your way. Your faith has made you well.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Now when He was asked by the Pharisees when the kingdom of God would come, He answered them and said,
The kingdom of God does not come with observation;
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: nor will they say, 'See here!' or 'See there!' For indeed, the kingdom of God is within you.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Then He said to the disciples,
The days will come when you will desire to see one of the days of the Son of Man, and you will not see it.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: And they will say to you, 'Look here!' or 'Look there!' Do not go after them or follow them.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: For as the lightning that flashes out of one part under heaven shines to the other part under heaven, so also the Son of Man will be in His day.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: But first He must suffer many things and be rejected by this generation.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: And as it was in the days of Noah, so it will be also in the days of the Son of Man:
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: They ate, they drank, they married wives, they were given in marriage, until the day that Noah entered the ark, and the flood came and destroyed them all.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Likewise as it was also in the days of Lot: They ate, they drank, they bought, they sold, they planted, they built;
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: but on the day that Lot went out of Sodom it rained fire and brimstone from heaven and destroyed them all.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Even so will it be in the day when the Son of Man is revealed.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: In that day, he who is on the housetop, and his goods are in the house, let him not come down to take them away. And likewise the one who is in the field, let him not turn back.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Remember Lot's wife.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Whoever seeks to save his life will lose it, and whoever loses his life will preserve it.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: I tell you, in that night there will be two men in one bed: the one will be taken and the other will be left.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Two women will be grinding together: the one will be taken and the other left.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Two men will be in the field: the one will be taken and the other left.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: And they answered and said to Him,
Where, Lord?
segments.speaker: Disciples

segments.text: So He said to them,
Wherever the body is, there the eagles will be gathered together.
segments.speaker: Jesus
